_comment: Synthetic HDFC Bank savings/current COMPACT-layout golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's hdfc_bank.py (BalanceLedgerStatementReader); values captured from a live run of the web reader + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Compact layout: DD/MM/YY dates, one row ending <ref> <value-date> <amount> <balance>; a single printed amount and an alphanumeric reference (captured as the serial); the opening balance is the first figure of the end-of-statement summary row. Narration is reproduced byte-for-byte incl. the web engine's stitching of adjacent header/summary lines.
lines: Date Narration Chq./Ref.No. ValueDt WithdrawalAmt. DepositAmt. ClosingBalance
OpeningBalance DrCount CrCount Debits Credits ClosingBal
